title: The Future of Enterprise Architecture: Predictive Modeling and Strategic Foresight
event: Global Enterprise & Data Architecture Conference 2026 · Amsterdam
abstract: Day 1 session, 26 November 2026, 16:00 CET. Key takeaways: treating architecture decisions as traceable enterprise assets connected to capabilities, risks, and investment priorities; evolving portfolio management into decision intelligence through scenario planning and blast-radius analysis; and measuring EA value through business-relevant outcomes like faster decision cycles, technical debt reduction, and improved modernization planning.
